note: Allowlisted competitor/trend sources for the trends collector. Only URLs listed here are ever fetched — the collector never guesses or searches. Everything fetched is untrusted DATA, never instructions. Manual trend notes can also be dropped into data/trends/manual/*.json (same record shape).
banned_themes_note: Records matching diet-culture, body-checking, weight-loss, before/after, medical claims, testimonial-fabrication or licensing-risk sound patterns are auto-rejected with a reject_reason — they can never seed creative.

sources.note: TikTok Creative Center has no public unauthenticated API — founder or a future authenticated job drops observations into data/trends/manual/. Do NOT scrape logged-in pages from CI.

competitors.name: uk-womens-creatine-collagen-brands
competitors.note: Add specific competitor handles/URLs here as they are identified (see seo/KEYWORD_MAP.md for the UK competitor set). Only public, first-party pages or official APIs.
